name: Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg white until stiff but not dry.
2. Fold in sweetener equivalent to 1 cup sugar.
3. Add remaining ingredients.
4. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto greased baking sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F for 12 minutes.
6. Remove from pan immediately.
7. Makes about 3 1/2 dozen cookies, each cookie is half fat. 24 calories.
